prompt: Identify the component or condition shown, and name the visible defect cues.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Condenser/heat pump setting, part of the HVAC-R scope. The observed field condition is: line set uninsulated suction. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: mfr install manual, IMC/IRC M1401.
title: Identification: Condenser/heat pump setting (residential job)
